description_long: This house features a red brick exterior with a complex, multi-sectioned layout, including several roof types and architectural projections. Large, arched windows dominate the front facade, while a glass-enclosed porch or sunroom extends from one side. The structure includes both flat and gabled roof sections, with a small octagonal turret and a visible chimney. A green lawn with a tree and a patio area with outdoor furniture are present on one side, adding to the residential feel. The rear and side elevations show additional windows, a secondary entrance, and a mix of roof heights and shapes. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern residential architecture, with attention to both form and function.
description: A large, red brick house with arched windows, multiple roof types, a glass sunroom, and a landscaped patio area. The design blends traditional and modern elements with detailed architectural features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, large windows, and a glass-enclosed porch on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof sections, octagonal turret, and a patio area with outdoor furniture and a tree.
description_view_2: Side view displaying symmetrical window arrangements, the green lawn, and the full extent of the house's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled roof sections, secondary entry, and the glass sunroom structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable with flat and turret sections
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows and bay projections
attribute_entryway_design: Main arched doorway with a covered porch, glass sunroom, and decorative brickwork
